arts.ttl: Man City vs Man Utd chaos as all 22 players clash after Kyle Walker 'embarrassment'
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City players brawled after a clash between Rasmus Hojlund and Kyle Walker, who angrily squared up to each other on the pitch at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Why aren’t Rashford or Garnacho playing for Man United against Man City in the Premier League?
arts.sum: It’s simply an evaluation, and they know it,“ the Portuguese coach told Sky. There were two surprising omissions from the team sheet for this evening’s Manchester derby at the Etihad - neither Alejandro Garnacho nor Marcus Rashford featured in Manchester United’s starting XI against City, and stranger still, nor were they on the bench.

arts.ttl: Everton claim shock win against title hopefuls Manchester City
arts.sum: Lucy Hope and Honoka Hayashi put the Toffees firmly in control with first-half goals.

arts.ttl: What happened after Mason Mount suffered latest Man United blow spoke volumes
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Mason Mount had his afternoon against Manchester City cut short as he is plagued with another injury

arts.ttl: BREAKING Ruben Amorim handed injury blow as Manchester United star limps off early vs Man City
arts.sum: Mason Mount had to replaced after 14 minutes of Man United's clash with Manchester City after picking up an injury.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane tells Marcus Rashford to quit Man Utd after derby snub - 'Enough is enough'
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was surprisingly left out of the Manchester United squad for the Manchester derby and Roy Keane believes the forward may be better off with a fresh start away from Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk sounds Man City warning to Liverpool teammates - 'It's not easy'
arts.sum: Manchester City have imploded and Virgil van Dijk feels it is a cautionary tale for Liverpool

arts.ttl: Mason Mount fights back tears as Man Utd star suffers injury early in Manchester derby
arts.sum: Manchester United midfielder Mason Mount has seemingly suffered a fresh injury setback and was forced off in the first half of Sunday's Manchester derby at The Etihad

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford suffers 'sad end' at Man United as Roy Keane urges striker to leave after Amorim's brutal decision
arts.sum: A major call from new United boss Ruben Amorim has left Marcus Rashford's future at Old Trafford looking less than certain

arts.ttl: Roy Keane says Man Utd should SELL Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: "Sometimes I think it's good to part ways," said Keane when discussing the situation on Sky Sports, indicating quite shockingly that he believes the best thing for Rashford to do is to leave Old Trafford in the coming January transfer window. "I don’t want to send a message, it is simply an evaluation and they know it," Amorim said to Sky Sports before the game.
